A '''battle''' at [[Selvaris]] took place in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], near the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] were preparing to move a number of ranking [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] from [[Selvaris]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in preparation for a major sacrifice. The prisoners included a number of celebrated heroes and resistance leaders, including [[Pash Cracken]] and [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]], whose continuing operations were deemed needed to continue the war effort. The Galactic Alliance launched a surprise rescue operation using information from [[Thorsh]], a Selvaris escapee, yet were only partially successful.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
